title: aethoria
body:
a 1.20.1 fabric based medieval modpack

![Aethoria](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef2646c471ea337352b74f50486baf73b85438b2_0.webp)

this  modpack aims to make minecraft feel completely different still keeping a vanilla look by adding games mecchanics like thirst and a better combat experience, by making exploration better with custom biomes and new creatures like dragons and much more; you can play with friends with the essential mod making the whole experience better


**!WARNING!**
be sure to have at least 12GB of free RAM or this modpack will not start, also before playing go in the default instance option in the modrinth setting and set the memory allocation to the max.
